folder_role: This folder owns the CLI bridge that connects spec-kit session resume operations to the code-graph MCP server runtime, enabling plugin injection during context compaction.

file_inventory.role: CLI entrypoint that initializes code-graph runtime, calls session resume handler, and outputs the transport payload for spec-kit plugin injection.

architecture_observation: This is a standalone CLI bridge that initializes the code-graph runtime (vector index and session manager), calls the session resume handler, and outputs the transport payload. It lives outside the .opencode/plugins/ directory to avoid OpenCode plugin discovery, serving as a targeted integration point for spec-kit context compaction workflows.

public_entrypoints.name: spec-kit-compact-code-graph-bridge.mjs
public_entrypoints.purpose: CLI executable that bridges spec-kit session resume to code-graph runtime, supporting --minimal and --spec-folder flags.

integration_notes: This bridge is invoked by spec-kit during context compaction to retrieve code-graph context for injection into the compacted session. It requires the MCP server to be built (dist/ directory present).
key_invariants: Bridge requires compiled dist/ directory from the MCP server
Runtime initialization must succeed before session resume is called
Output is JSON text payload on stdout, errors on stderr
